entries.definition:
t–l–l drizzle, dew; to moisten, to sprinkle; to come into view, to look down upon; good living; ruins. Of this root, طَلّ tall occurs in a single place in the Qur’an.
طَلّ tall [n.] drizzle, dew (2:265) فَإِن لَّمْ يُصِبْهَا وَابِلٌ فَطَلٌّ but if no heavy rain falls on it, then [there would still be] the drizzle/dew.
